zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sully於1100年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易時，她的父親Guillaume de Blois18歲，母親Agnès de Sully21歲。她於1114年之後與Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1145年12月14日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年45歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sully was born in 1100, in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Guillaume de Blois, was 18 and her mother, Agnès de Sully, was 21. She married Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I after 1114, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 December 1145, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 45, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sully est née en 1100, à Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Guillaume de Blois, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Sully, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Comte d’Eu Henry d'Eu I après 1114, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1145, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Sully 1100 in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Blois 18 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Sully 21. Sie hat nach 1114 in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1145 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sully è nata il nel 1100 nel Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Blois, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Sully, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I dopo il 1114, nel Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1145, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sullyが1100年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトスリ-スル-ロイアーで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Bloisは18歳，母Agnès de Sullyは21歳であった。1114年以後にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウでComte de Eu Henry d'Eu Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1145年12月14日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで45歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.Sully-Sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val De L: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르
ko.Fontevrault, Maine-Et-Loire, Pays De La: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sully(이)가 1100년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Blois(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Sully(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1114년 이후 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 12월 14일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

pt.Sully-Sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val De L: Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França
pt.Fontevrault, Maine-Et-Loire, Pays De La: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sully nasceu em 1100, em Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Blois, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Sully, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I após 1114, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1145, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.Sully-Sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val De L: сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.Fontevrault, Maine-Et-Loire, Pays De La: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sully родилась в 1100 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Blois было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Sully, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I после 1114 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 декабря 1145 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.Fontevrault, Maine-Et-Loire, Pays De La: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Sully nació en 1100, en Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Blois, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnès de Sully, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I después de 1114, en Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1145, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
